fields.Name: Materialize List From View
fields.Description: Create a new MJ List from a User View. Thin wrapper around ListOperations.MaterializeFromView. Captures lineage when RememberLineage=true. Cannot produce drops (target is new).

fields.Name: Add View Results To List
fields.Description: Append a User View's current results to an existing List. Always additive — never removes existing members. Dedupes silently.

fields.Name: Refresh List From Source
fields.Description: Refresh an existing lineage-bearing List against its captured source view (Additive or Sync mode). Sync-mode refreshes that would remove records require ConfirmDrops=true; otherwise rejected with DROP_NOT_CONFIRMED.

fields.Name: Compose Lists
fields.Description: Compose multiple List or View sources into a delta via a set-op (union / intersection / difference). Preview-only by default; supplying a Target projects the result into that list, which can trigger the drop-guard.

fields.Name: Share List
fields.Description: Grant a direct share on a List to a user or role. Idempotent at the (list, target) pair. Writes to ResourcePermission; emits a share-notification when sharing with a user.

fields.Name: Invite To List
fields.Description: Issue a pending-email invitation to share a List. Returns a generated token + expiry. Caller is expected to deliver an accept link to the recipient.

fields.Name: Unshare List
fields.Description: Revoke a previously-granted List permission. Soft-revokes (sets Status='Revoked' on ResourcePermission) so the audit trail remains intact.

fields.Name: Revoke List Invitation
fields.Description: Revoke a pending List invitation before it has been accepted. Returns INVITATION_ALREADY_USED if the invitation was already consumed — callers should use Unshare List against the resulting permission row in that case.

fields.Name: Resolve Audience
fields.Description: Resolve an AudienceSource (list / view / ad-hoc filter) to its current record IDs. Read-only — never mutates. Useful for previewing how many records a campaign would hit before sending.

fields.Name: Move List Members
fields.Description: Move (or copy) a set of records from one list to another. Move mode also removes the records from the source list — requires ConfirmDrops=true to actually delete. Copy mode skips the removal step.

fields.Name: Bulk Update List Item Status
fields.Description: Bulk-update the Status field on MJ: List Detail rows for a given list. NewStatus must match the MJ: List Detail Status check constraint (Active / Complete / Disabled / Error / Other / Pending / Rejected).

fields.Name: Send To Audience
fields.Description: Send a single message template to every record resolved from an AudienceSource. Wraps SendToAudience() in @memberjunction/communication-engine. Records missing the recipient field are skipped and surfaced in SkippedRecords output.
